action.text: SA 4423 fell when SA 4422 (the instructions of the motion to refer) fell.
Considered by Senate (Message from the House considered).
Considered by Senate (Message from the House considered).
Considered by Senate (Message from the House considered).
Considered by Senate (Message from the House considered).
Considered by Senate (Message from the House considered).
Considered by Senate (Message from the House considered).
Amendment SA 4423 proposed by Senator Thune to Amendment SA 4422 (the instructions of the motion to refer). (consideration: CR S1067) To improve the bill.
Senate amendment proposed (on the floor): Amendment SA 4423 proposed by Senator Thune to Amendment SA 4422 (the instructions of the motion to refer).
